subcodes.first_line: O esteemed teacher, steadfast in servitude to the All-Merciful Lord, may God increase thy knowledge and certitude [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایها الاستاذ الکریم القائم علی عبودیه الرب الرحیم زادک الله علما و ایقانا
subcodes.subjects: @soul; spirit after death, @realms of being; three realms; five realms, @consolation and comfort
